title: Elbow Grease Dishwasher Salt | Prevents White Marks & Limescale | Improves Cleaning Performance & Softens Water (Resealable 2kg Bag)
features: HARD WATER HERO: Built as a water softener, it tackles minerals before they cause trouble. Perfect for hard-water areas where plates can feel gritty and the machine works overtime.
SPOTLESS GLASSES: Dishwasher salt helps stop cloudy film and white marks. Pour into the reservoir and enjoy sparkling glasses after a family roast or a midweek pasta rush.
BOOSTS EVERY WASH: Softer water lets tablets and detergent do their job better. Ideal for greasy pans, baked-on lasagne dishes, and everyday cutlery that needs a proper clean.
UNIVERSAL FIT: Suitable for all dishwashers, big or slimline. Use in rented flats, student houses, or the family kitchen without worrying about brand compatibility.
RESEAL AND POUR: The resealable 2kg bag keeps granules dry between refills. Pop it under the sink and grab it quickly when the salt reservoir runs low.
EASY CARRY HANDLE: Built-in handle makes lifting and topping up less messy. Great for quick refills without juggling a heavy pack across the kitchen floor.
PAIR WITH ROUTINE CARE: Use alongside a dishwasher cleaner for a fresh, efficient machine. Brilliant as part of a monthly tidy-up.
MORE SPARKLE, LESS STRESS: Helps stop streaks and keeps dishes looking bright. Ideal before guests arrive, so everything comes out clean, clear, and ready for the table.
CLEANER RESULTS: This water softener supports better detergent performance, so food lifts away easier. Perfect for sticky porridge bowls, oily air-fryer trays and sauce-splashed cutlery.
TIDY STORAGE: The resealable 2kg bag helps keep salt dry and free-flowing. Pop it in a cupboard, grab the handle, and refill without bits scattering across the counter.
description: Product Description Hard water can leave white marks on glasses, inviting limescale to settle inside the machine. Elbow Grease dishwasher salt is made to keep dishwashers performing at their best by softening the water, so detergent can get on with the job and dishes come out looking properly clean. Used as a simple water softener, it helps protect key parts of the dishwasher from limescale build up, which means fewer cloudy results and more shine on plates, mugs and cutlery. The handy 2kg resealable bag keeps the granules dry and ready, and the carry handle makes topping up easier and mess-free. Just follow the dishwasher manufacturer’s guidance, keep the salt reservoir topped up, and check levels more often in hard water areas. Pair it with a regular dishwasher cleaner for an even fresher machine, and enjoy that satisfying “new dishwasher” sparkle without the fuss. Store in a dry place away from heat and moisture. Whether it’s daily school lunchboxes or a weekend bake-off, this limescale remover routine helps every load finish clearer, brighter and ready for use. Ingredients Salt Directions * Always follow your dishwasher manufacturers instructions * Always keep the salt reservoir full * Top up salt reservoir as required using a cup or a scoop (not provided) * Check the salt level frequently, especially in areas of hard water * Do not ingest. Not for human consumption. * Store in a dry environment away from heat and moisture. See more
